summary: Step 6 testing completed - verified extension system (max=1), owner_bonus, weeks slider max=4, and skill change arrows. Found and fixed 2 bugs: backend extensions_remaining calculation and frontend 'tutte le 3 estensioni' text.

minor.issue: extensions_remaining calculation was using 3 - count instead of 1 - count

ui_bugs.issue: Text said 'tutte le 3 estensioni disponibili' - updated to 'l'unica estensione disponibile'

integration_issues.issue: Page shows 'Qualcosa è andato storto' error when loading - needs investigation

action_items: Investigate FilmDetail page error 'Qualcosa è andato storto' - APIs work but page shows error
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/films/{id}/extend correctly rejects with 'Estensione già utilizzata (1/1)' after 1 use
game_systems.py calculate_cinema_daily_revenue correctly includes owner_bonus (1.15 for owned films)
FilmWizard weeks slider correctly has max=4
NotificationsPage, DiscoveredStars, CinemaJournal all have skill change arrows (▲/▼) for skill_changes
skill_changes field currently has all 0 values in production data, so arrows won't be visible yet

success_rate.frontend: 80% (FilmWizard weeks slider verified, FilmDetail page has loading error)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 6 features verified via backend tests. FilmDetail page shows error when loading - APIs work fine individually but page throws error. skill_changes field has all 0 values so arrows won't be visible in UI until skills actually change.

FilmWizard weeks slider max=4.details: Slider configured with min=1 max=4 in FilmWizard.jsx line 1127

NotificationsPage skill arrows.details: Code checks skill_changes and shows ▲/▼ arrows for non-zero changes

DiscoveredStars skill arrows.details: Code checks skill_changes and shows ▲/▼ arrows for non-zero changes

CinemaJournal skill arrows.details: Code checks change !== 0 and shows ▲/▼ arrows
